section.title: db.removeProcedures(<function name>)
section.p: Deletes the specified function name, function name must exist, otherwise an exception message.

section.title: Parameter Description
section.p: Defined removeProcedures() method, only one string type parameter name function name, its value must already exits, otherwise an exception.

ul.li: Delete the sum functiondb.removeProcedures("sum")Function must be guaranteed and consistent definition of the function name. Such as db.removeProcedures('sum') call will return a failure.
